WITH patient_specialty_counts AS (
    SELECT p.patient_id, COUNT(DISTINCT d.specialty) AS specialty_count
    FROM patients p
    JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
    JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id
    GROUP BY p.patient_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.specialty) > 1
),
patient_invoices AS (
    SELECT p.patient_id, p.insurance_provider, SUM(i.total_amount) AS total_amount
    FROM patients p
    JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
    JOIN invoices i ON a.appointment_id = i.appointment_id
    GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.insurance_provider
),
avg_by_provider AS (
    SELECT insurance_provider, AVG(total_amount) AS avg_total
    FROM patient_invoices
    GROUP BY insurance_provider
)
SELECT p.patient_id, p.patient_name
FROM patients p
JOIN patient_specialty_counts psc ON p.patient_id = psc.patient_id
JOIN patient_invoices pi ON p.patient_id = pi.patient_id
JOIN avg_by_provider abp ON pi.insurance_provider = abp.insurance_provider
WHERE pi.total_amount > abp.avg_total

JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
JOIN invoices i ON a.appointment_id = i.appointment_id
JOIN lab_results l ON a.appointment_id = l.appointment_id
WHERE l.result_flag IN ('high', 'low', 'critical')
GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.patient_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT l.test_name) > 1
   AND (i.total_amount - i.insurance_paid) > (
       SELECT AVG(total_amount - insurance_paid)
       FROM invoices
       WHERE payment_status IN ('unpaid', 'partial')

generated_sql.sql:
WITH patient_abnormal_tests AS (
    SELECT p.patient_id, p.patient_name, COUNT(DISTINCT l.test_name) AS abnormal_test_count
    FROM patients p
    JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
    JOIN lab_results l ON a.appointment_id = l.appointment_id
    WHERE l.result_flag IN ('high', 'low', 'critical')
    GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.patient_name
),
patient_balances AS (
    SELECT p.patient_id, SUM(i.total_amount - i.insurance_paid) AS outstanding_balance
    FROM patients p
    JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
    JOIN invoices i ON a.appointment_id = i.appointment_id
    GROUP BY p.patient_id
),
avg_balance AS (
    SELECT AVG(outstanding_balance) AS avg_outstanding
    FROM patient_balances
)
SELECT pat.patient_id, pat.patient_name
FROM patient_abnormal_tests pat
JOIN patient_balances bal ON pat.patient_id = bal.patient_id
CROSS JOIN avg_balance ab
WHERE pat.abnormal_test_count > 1
  AND bal.outstanding_balance > ab.avg_outstanding
